name: Cure Light Wounds
effect: Heals 2-7 hp or removes paralysis from one living creature.
manualNotes: Heals light damage or paralysis; reverse causes 2-7 damage by touch.
suggestedEffect: Heals 2-7 hp or removes paralysis from one living creature.

name: Detect Magic
effect: Magical objects, creatures, and places within 60 ft glow.
manualNotes: Caster sees magic within 60 ft glow for a short time.
suggestedEffect: Magical objects, creatures, and places within 60 ft glow.

name: Light
effect: Creates light in a 30 ft diameter volume; can blind if cast at eyes.
manualNotes: Creates torch-like light; reverse creates darkness.
suggestedEffect: Creates light in a 30 ft diameter volume; can blind if cast at eyes.

name: Protection from Evil
effect: Caster gains protective barrier: attacks -1, saves +1; enchanted creatures blocked.
manualNotes: Protects caster from hostile attacks and blocks enchanted melee contact.
suggestedEffect: Caster gains protective barrier: attacks -1, saves +1; enchanted creatures blocked.

name: Purify Food and Water
effect: Purifies spoiled/poisoned food or water; can settle mud into clear water.
manualNotes: Makes food and water safe; does not affect living creatures.
suggestedEffect: Purifies spoiled/poisoned food or water; can settle mud into clear water.

name: Remove Fear
effect: Calms one living creature and may end magical fear with a bonus save.
manualNotes: Removes fear; reverse causes fear.
suggestedEffect: Calms one living creature and may end magical fear with a bonus save.

name: Resist Cold
effect: Creatures within 30 ft resist freezing; +2 saves vs cold and -1 damage per die.
manualNotes: Party near caster resists cold and cold-based attacks.
suggestedEffect: Creatures within 30 ft resist freezing; +2 saves vs cold and -1 damage per die.

name: Bless
effect: Friendly creatures in 20 ft square gain +1 morale, hit, and damage before melee.
manualNotes: Bless buffs allies not yet in melee; reverse penalizes enemies.
suggestedEffect: Friendly creatures in 20 ft square gain +1 morale, hit, and damage before melee.

name: Find Traps
effect: Traps within 30 ft glow blue when the cleric approaches.
manualNotes: Reveals presence of traps, not type or removal method.
suggestedEffect: Traps within 30 ft glow blue when the cleric approaches.

name: Hold Person
effect: Paralyzes up to 4 humanoids; single target saves at -2.
manualNotes: Paralyzes humanoids; reverse frees held persons.
suggestedEffect: Paralyzes up to 4 humanoids; single target saves at -2.

name: Know Alignment
effect: Reveals alignment of one creature, item, or area within 10 ft.
manualNotes: Identifies alignment; reverse masks with false alignment.
suggestedEffect: Reveals alignment of one creature, item, or area within 10 ft.

name: Silence 15' Radius
effect: Creates 30 ft diameter silence; moving target may carry effect if save fails.
manualNotes: Stops speech and spellcasting inside the silent area.
suggestedEffect: Creates 30 ft diameter silence; moving target may carry effect if save fails.

name: Snake Charm
effect: Charms 1 HD of snakes per caster level; no save.
manualNotes: Snakes sway harmlessly unless attacked; shorter duration in combat.
suggestedEffect: Charms 1 HD of snakes per caster level; no save.

name: Speak with Animals
effect: Caster speaks with one named animal type within 30 ft.
manualNotes: Talks to a chosen animal type; reactions are usually favorable.
suggestedEffect: Caster speaks with one named animal type within 30 ft.

name: Continual Light
effect: Creates daylight-bright 60 ft sphere; can blind if cast at eyes.
manualNotes: Permanent daylight effect; reverse creates continual darkness.
suggestedEffect: Creates daylight-bright 60 ft sphere; can blind if cast at eyes.

name: Cure Disease
effect: Cures one disease; high-level caster can cure lycanthropy.
manualNotes: Cures disease; reverse inflicts wasting disease.
suggestedEffect: Cures one disease; high-level caster can cure lycanthropy.

name: Growth of Animal
effect: Doubles size, strength, damage, and carrying capacity of one animal.
manualNotes: Enlarges normal or giant animal without changing behavior.
suggestedEffect: Doubles size, strength, damage, and carrying capacity of one animal.

name: Locate Object
effect: Caster senses direction of one known object within 120 ft.
manualNotes: Detects direction only; does not locate creatures.
suggestedEffect: Caster senses direction of one known object within 120 ft.

name: Remove Curse
effect: Removes one curse from creature, item, or area; some removals may be temporary.
manualNotes: Removes curses; reverse applies a misfortune or penalty.
suggestedEffect: Removes one curse from creature, item, or area; some removals may be temporary.

name: Striking
effect: One weapon gains +1d6 damage per attack and can harm magic-only targets for that bonus.
manualNotes: Temporarily empowers a weapon with extra striking damage.
suggestedEffect: One weapon gains +1d6 damage per attack and can harm magic-only targets for that bonus.

name: Warp Wood
effect: Bends or warps wooden items, usually spoiling weapons, doors, or small objects.
manualNotes: Warps wood; useful against bows, doors, shafts, and similar items.
suggestedEffect: Bends or warps wooden items, usually spoiling weapons, doors, or small objects.

name: Create Water
effect: Creates a spring with water for 12 men and mounts, plus more at higher levels.
manualNotes: Creates drinking water from ground or wall for one hour.
suggestedEffect: Creates a spring with water for 12 men and mounts, plus more at higher levels.

name: Cure Serious Wounds
effect: Heals 4-14 hp damage to one living creature.
manualNotes: Heals serious wounds; reverse causes 4-14 damage by touch.
suggestedEffect: Heals 4-14 hp damage to one living creature.

name: Neutralize Poison
effect: Neutralizes poison in creature, container, or object; can revive poison death within 10 rounds.
manualNotes: Makes poison harmless; reverse creates lethal poison.
suggestedEffect: Neutralizes poison in creature, container, or object; can revive poison death within 10 rounds.

name: Protection from Evil 10' Radius
effect: 20 ft diameter barrier gives allies +1 saves, attackers -1 hit, and blocks enchanted melee.
manualNotes: Area version of protection from evil centered on caster.
suggestedEffect: 20 ft diameter barrier gives allies +1 saves, attackers -1 hit, and blocks enchanted melee.

name: Speak with Plants
effect: Caster speaks with plants within 30 ft and can request simple favors.
manualNotes: Allows plant communication and passage through vegetation.
suggestedEffect: Caster speaks with plants within 30 ft and can request simple favors.

name: Sticks to Snakes
effect: Turns 2-16 sticks into snakes that obey the cleric.
manualNotes: Creates temporary snake servants from sticks.
suggestedEffect: Turns 2-16 sticks into snakes that obey the cleric.

name: Commune
effect: Cleric asks higher powers three yes/no questions; usable rarely.
manualNotes: Ask divine powers limited questions for guidance.
suggestedEffect: Cleric asks higher powers three yes/no questions; usable rarely.

name: Create Food
effect: Creates food for 12 men and mounts for one day, more at higher levels.
manualNotes: Creates sustaining food for a group and mounts.
suggestedEffect: Creates food for 12 men and mounts for one day, more at higher levels.

name: Cure Critical Wounds
effect: Cures 6-21 hp damage to one living creature; reverse causes same damage by touch.
manualNotes: Major cure spell; reverse causes critical wounds by touch.
suggestedEffect: Cures 6-21 hp damage to one living creature; reverse causes same damage by touch.

name: Dispel Evil
effect: Banishing/protective power against enchanted or summoned evil creatures and curses.
manualNotes: Can drive away or destroy evil magical influence at close range.
suggestedEffect: Banishing/protective power against enchanted or summoned evil creatures and curses.

name: Insect Plague
effect: Summons a 60 ft swarm cloud that drives away creatures under 3 HD.
manualNotes: Creates a large insect swarm that disrupts weak creatures.
suggestedEffect: Summons a 60 ft swarm cloud that drives away creatures under 3 HD.

name: Quest
effect: Compels a creature to perform or avoid a task; refusal causes penalties.
manualNotes: Places a divine obligation; reverse removes quest.
suggestedEffect: Compels a creature to perform or avoid a task; refusal causes penalties.

name: Raise Dead
effect: Restores a dead human/demi-human within time limit; recipient returns weak.
manualNotes: Raises dead; reverse can slay like finger of death.
suggestedEffect: Restores a dead human/demi-human within time limit; recipient returns weak.

name: Truesight
effect: Reveals hidden, invisible, ethereal, disguised, and polymorphed things within 120 ft; also reveals alignment and power.
manualNotes: Powerful true-seeing effect within 120 ft.
suggestedEffect: Reveals hidden, invisible, ethereal, disguised, and polymorphed things within 120 ft; also reveals alignment and power.

name: Aerial Servant
effect: Summons an aerial servant to fetch a described creature or item from an approximate location.
manualNotes: Summons servant to retrieve one named target.
suggestedEffect: Summons an aerial servant to fetch a described creature or item from an approximate location.

name: Barrier
effect: Creates a 30 ft diameter by 30 ft high wall of whirling hammers; passing through causes 7-70 damage.
manualNotes: Blocks passage with damaging hammer barrier; reverse removes clerical/magical walls.
suggestedEffect: Creates a 30 ft diameter by 30 ft high wall of whirling hammers; passing through causes 7-70 damage.

name: Create Normal Animals
effect: Creates 1 large, 3 medium, or 6 small normal loyal animals that obey the cleric.
manualNotes: Creates temporary normal animals under command.
suggestedEffect: Creates 1 large, 3 medium, or 6 small normal loyal animals that obey the cleric.

name: Earthquake
effect: Shakes earth in a large area, damaging structures and opening cracks that may engulf creatures.
manualNotes: Creates destructive earth tremors over a scaling area.
suggestedEffect: Shakes earth in a large area, damaging structures and opening cracks that may engulf creatures.

name: Holy Word
effect: Affects all creatures within 40 ft whose alignment differs from the cleric: may kill, stun, or deafen by level.
save: spells negates for level 13+ or same alignment
manualNotes: Alignment-based area word with severe effects.
suggestedEffect: Affects all creatures within 40 ft whose alignment differs from the cleric: may kill, stun, or deafen by level.
suggestedSave: spells negates for level 13+ or same alignment

name: Restore
effect: Restores one full level of energy experience lost to energy drain; reverse drains one level.
manualNotes: Restores one drained level; reverse drains one level.
suggestedEffect: Restores one full level of energy experience lost to energy drain; reverse drains one level.

name: Raise Dead Fully
effect: Raises any living creature; humans and demi-humans return fully healed and ready to act.
manualNotes: Full resurrection; reverse obliterates living targets like the spell affects undead.
suggestedEffect: Raises any living creature; humans and demi-humans return fully healed and ready to act.

name: Faerie Fire
effect: Outlines detected creatures or objects with harmless green fire; attacks against them gain +2 to hit.
manualNotes: Outlines targets and makes them easier to hit.
suggestedEffect: Outlines detected creatures or objects with harmless green fire; attacks against them gain +2 to hit.

name: Locate
effect: Caster senses direction of one known animal, plant, or natural outdoor object within range.
manualNotes: Nature-focused locate effect.
suggestedEffect: Caster senses direction of one known animal, plant, or natural outdoor object within range.

name: Predict Weather
effect: Caster accurately predicts natural weather in the local area for the next 12 hours.
manualNotes: Predicts upcoming natural weather.
suggestedEffect: Caster accurately predicts natural weather in the local area for the next 12 hours.

name: Obscure
effect: Creates a misty cloud around the druid, heavily obscuring sight in a 10 ft radius per level.
manualNotes: Creates fog-like concealment around caster.
suggestedEffect: Creates a misty cloud around the druid, heavily obscuring sight in a 10 ft radius per level.

name: Produce Fire
effect: Creates a magical flame in the druid's hand that can ignite objects or be thrown.
manualNotes: Creates controllable magical fire.
suggestedEffect: Creates a magical flame in the druid's hand that can ignite objects or be thrown.

name: Warp Wood
effect: Bends and warps wooden weapons, doors, or objects, often making them useless.
manualNotes: Warps wooden objects out of shape.
suggestedEffect: Bends and warps wooden weapons, doors, or objects, often making them useless.

name: Call Lightning
effect: Calls lightning bolts from stormy skies; each bolt deals heavy electrical damage in an area.
manualNotes: Calls lightning during a storm.
suggestedEffect: Calls lightning bolts from stormy skies; each bolt deals heavy electrical damage in an area.

name: Hold Animal
effect: Paralyzes normal or giant animals of animal intelligence within range.
manualNotes: Holds animal targets immobile.
suggestedEffect: Paralyzes normal or giant animals of animal intelligence within range.

name: Water Breathing
effect: Allows one air-breathing creature to breathe water; reverse lets water-breathers breathe air.
manualNotes: Allows breathing in water.
suggestedEffect: Allows one air-breathing creature to breathe water; reverse lets water-breathers breathe air.

name: Control Temperature 10' Radius
effect: Changes temperature within 10 ft of the caster to extreme heat or cold.
manualNotes: Controls local temperature around caster.
suggestedEffect: Changes temperature within 10 ft of the caster to extreme heat or cold.

name: Protection from Lightning
effect: Protects one creature from lightning damage, including natural and magical lightning.
manualNotes: Grants lightning protection.
suggestedEffect: Protects one creature from lightning damage, including natural and magical lightning.

name: Anti-Plant Shell
effect: Personal invisible barrier blocks attacks from plants and plant-like monsters.
manualNotes: Blocks plant attacks around caster.
suggestedEffect: Personal invisible barrier blocks attacks from plants and plant-like monsters.

name: Control Winds
effect: Calms or increases winds within range; can affect air creatures with proper control.
manualNotes: Controls wind strength around caster.
suggestedEffect: Calms or increases winds within range; can affect air creatures with proper control.

name: Charm Person
effect: Charms one humanoid as a trusted friend; repeat saves based on Intelligence.
manualNotes: Makes a humanoid friendly unless save succeeds.
suggestedEffect: Charms one humanoid as a trusted friend; repeat saves based on Intelligence.

name: Detect Magic
effect: Magic within 60 ft glows to the caster.
manualNotes: Caster sees magical auras nearby.
suggestedEffect: Magic within 60 ft glows to the caster.

name: Floating Disc
effect: Creates floating disc carrying up to 5,000 cn, following caster.
manualNotes: Creates a hovering carrier for treasure or gear.
suggestedEffect: Creates floating disc carrying up to 5,000 cn, following caster.

name: Hold Portal
effect: Magically holds one door, gate, or similar portal shut.
manualNotes: Holds a portal closed unless forced or magically opened.
suggestedEffect: Magically holds one door, gate, or similar portal shut.

name: Light
effect: Creates 30 ft diameter light; can blind if targeted.
manualNotes: Creates light; reverse creates darkness.
suggestedEffect: Creates 30 ft diameter light; can blind if targeted.

name: Magic Missile
effect: Creates unerring magical missile(s) dealing 1d6+1 damage each.
manualNotes: Automatically hits visible target within range.
suggestedEffect: Creates unerring magical missile(s) dealing 1d6+1 damage each.

name: Protection from Evil
effect: Caster gains attacks -1, saves +1, and enchanted creatures are blocked.
manualNotes: Protects caster from hostile and enchanted melee attacks.
suggestedEffect: Caster gains attacks -1, saves +1, and enchanted creatures are blocked.

name: Read Languages
effect: Caster reads unknown languages, codes, maps, and inscriptions.
manualNotes: Translates written language but not magical writing.
suggestedEffect: Caster reads unknown languages, codes, maps, and inscriptions.

name: Read Magic
effect: Caster reads magical writing and scrolls.
manualNotes: Allows reading spell books, scrolls, and magical inscriptions.
suggestedEffect: Caster reads magical writing and scrolls.

name: Shield
effect: Invisible barrier improves AC and blocks magic missiles.
manualNotes: Defensive shield protects caster, especially from missiles.
suggestedEffect: Invisible barrier improves AC and blocks magic missiles.

name: Sleep
effect: Puts 2d8 HD of creatures to sleep, usually affecting weakest first.
manualNotes: Drops low-HD enemies asleep; no save.
suggestedEffect: Puts 2d8 HD of creatures to sleep, usually affecting weakest first.

name: Ventriloquism
effect: Caster makes voice or sound appear to come from elsewhere.
manualNotes: Throws the caster’s voice to mislead listeners.
suggestedEffect: Caster makes voice or sound appear to come from elsewhere.

name: Continual Light
effect: Creates daylight-bright 60 ft sphere; can blind if targeted.
manualNotes: Permanent light; reverse creates continual darkness.
suggestedEffect: Creates daylight-bright 60 ft sphere; can blind if targeted.

name: Detect Evil
effect: Detects evil intentions or evil-enchanted objects.
manualNotes: Reveals evil intent or magic, not traps or poison.
suggestedEffect: Detects evil intentions or evil-enchanted objects.

name: Detect Invisible
effect: Caster can see invisible creatures and objects within range.
manualNotes: Reveals invisible things to caster.
suggestedEffect: Caster can see invisible creatures and objects within range.

name: ESP
effect: Caster reads surface thoughts in one direction through some barriers.
manualNotes: Reads thoughts of creatures in range and direction.
suggestedEffect: Caster reads surface thoughts in one direction through some barriers.

name: Invisibility
effect: One creature or object becomes invisible until attacking/casting or dispelled.
manualNotes: Makes target invisible until it takes hostile action.
suggestedEffect: One creature or object becomes invisible until attacking/casting or dispelled.

name: Knock
effect: Opens stuck, locked, barred, or magically held portals.
manualNotes: Opens locked or held doors and similar closures.
suggestedEffect: Opens stuck, locked, barred, or magically held portals.

name: Levitate
effect: Caster moves up or down vertically by mental control.
manualNotes: Allows vertical movement but not horizontal flight.
suggestedEffect: Caster moves up or down vertically by mental control.

name: Locate Object
effect: Caster senses direction of a known object within 60 ft + 10 ft/level.
manualNotes: Detects direction of a familiar object.
suggestedEffect: Caster senses direction of a known object within 60 ft + 10 ft/level.

name: Mirror Image
effect: Creates 1d4 illusory duplicates that may absorb attacks.
manualNotes: Creates duplicate images to confuse attackers.
suggestedEffect: Creates 1d4 illusory duplicates that may absorb attacks.

name: Phantasmal Force
effect: Creates a visual illusion in a 20 ft cube.
manualNotes: Creates an illusion sustained by concentration.
suggestedEffect: Creates a visual illusion in a 20 ft cube.

name: Web
effect: Fills up to 10x10x10 ft with sticky webs, entangling creatures.
manualNotes: Entangles creatures; fire can burn webs away.
suggestedEffect: Fills up to 10x10x10 ft with sticky webs, entangling creatures.

name: Wizard Lock
effect: Magically locks a portal; higher-level casters may bypass.
manualNotes: Long-term magical lock on door or portal.
suggestedEffect: Magically locks a portal; higher-level casters may bypass.

name: Clairvoyance
effect: See through the eyes of one creature in range.
manualNotes: Remote sight through another creature.
suggestedEffect: See through the eyes of one creature in range.

name: Dispel Magic
effect: Ends spell effects in 20 ft cube; higher-level effects may resist.
manualNotes: Removes active spell effects, not magic items.
suggestedEffect: Ends spell effects in 20 ft cube; higher-level effects may resist.

name: Fire Ball
effect: 20 ft radius explosion deals 1d6 fire damage per caster level.
manualNotes: Area fire blast; capped by caster level rules.
suggestedEffect: 20 ft radius explosion deals 1d6 fire damage per caster level.

name: Fly
effect: Target flies at 360 ft/turn with concentration.
manualNotes: Grants controlled flight for variable duration.
suggestedEffect: Target flies at 360 ft/turn with concentration.

name: Haste
effect: Up to 24 creatures move and attack at double speed.
manualNotes: Speeds allies; multiple haste effects do not stack.
suggestedEffect: Up to 24 creatures move and attack at double speed.

name: Hold Person
effect: Paralyzes up to 4 humanoids; single target saves at -2.
manualNotes: Paralyzes humanoids like cleric spell.
suggestedEffect: Paralyzes up to 4 humanoids; single target saves at -2.

name: Infravision
effect: Gives 60 ft infravision.
manualNotes: Grants heat-sight in darkness.
suggestedEffect: Gives 60 ft infravision.

name: Invisibility 10' Radius
effect: All within 10 ft of target become invisible until attacking/casting or leaving area.
manualNotes: Group invisibility centered on target.
suggestedEffect: All within 10 ft of target become invisible until attacking/casting or leaving area.

name: Lightning Bolt
effect: Bolt deals 1d6 lightning damage per caster level, bouncing off barriers.
manualNotes: Line attack with rebound risk.
suggestedEffect: Bolt deals 1d6 lightning damage per caster level, bouncing off barriers.

name: Protection from Evil 10' Radius
effect: 20 ft diameter protection from evil around caster.
manualNotes: Area protective barrier against evil/enchanted attacks.
suggestedEffect: 20 ft diameter protection from evil around caster.

name: Protection from Normal Missiles
effect: One target is immune to small nonmagical missiles.
manualNotes: Blocks normal arrows, bolts, and similar missiles.
suggestedEffect: One target is immune to small nonmagical missiles.

name: Water Breathing
effect: One target can breathe underwater.
manualNotes: Allows underwater breathing for a day.
suggestedEffect: One target can breathe underwater.

name: Charm Monster
effect: Charms one or more living creatures as friends.
manualNotes: Like charm person but works on monsters.
suggestedEffect: Charms one or more living creatures as friends.

name: Confusion
effect: Confuses creatures in 60 ft area, causing random actions.
manualNotes: Area mental confusion.
suggestedEffect: Confuses creatures in 60 ft area, causing random actions.

name: Dimension Door
effect: Teleports caster or one target up to 360 ft.
manualNotes: Short-range teleport without error.
suggestedEffect: Teleports caster or one target up to 360 ft.

name: Growth of Plants
effect: Thickens vegetation into an impassable barrier.
manualNotes: Turns plants into dense obstacle.
suggestedEffect: Thickens vegetation into an impassable barrier.

name: Hallucinatory Terrain
effect: Creates terrain illusion over outdoor area.
manualNotes: Makes terrain appear different.
suggestedEffect: Creates terrain illusion over outdoor area.

name: Massmorph
effect: Makes up to 100 creatures look like trees/woods.
manualNotes: Camouflages a group as woodland.
suggestedEffect: Makes up to 100 creatures look like trees/woods.

name: Polymorph Other
effect: Changes one creature into another form.
manualNotes: Transforms a target creature.
suggestedEffect: Changes one creature into another form.

name: Polymorph Self
effect: Caster assumes another form with movement but not special attacks.
manualNotes: Caster shapeshifts temporarily.
suggestedEffect: Caster assumes another form with movement but not special attacks.

name: Remove Curse
effect: Removes a curse; reverse bestows curse.
manualNotes: Removes magical curse or cursed item bond.
suggestedEffect: Removes a curse; reverse bestows curse.

name: Wall of Fire
effect: Creates fiery wall damaging creatures passing through.
manualNotes: Fire barrier, especially strong vs cold creatures.
suggestedEffect: Creates fiery wall damaging creatures passing through.

name: Wall of Ice
effect: Creates wall or hemisphere of ice.
manualNotes: Creates solid ice barrier.
suggestedEffect: Creates wall or hemisphere of ice.

name: Wizard Eye
effect: Invisible magical eye scouts under caster control.
manualNotes: Remote scouting sensor.
suggestedEffect: Invisible magical eye scouts under caster control.

name: Animate Dead
effect: Creates skeletons or zombies from remains.
manualNotes: Animates undead servants.
suggestedEffect: Creates skeletons or zombies from remains.

name: Cloudkill
effect: Creates moving poisonous cloud killing weak creatures.
manualNotes: Poison cloud deadly to low-HD creatures.
suggestedEffect: Creates moving poisonous cloud killing weak creatures.

name: Conjure Elemental
effect: Summons and controls one 16 HD elemental.
manualNotes: Summons elemental; loss of concentration is dangerous.
suggestedEffect: Summons and controls one 16 HD elemental.

name: Feeblemind
effect: Reduces spellcaster intelligence to near animal level.
manualNotes: Disables enemy spellcasters.
suggestedEffect: Reduces spellcaster intelligence to near animal level.

name: Hold Monster
effect: Paralyzes up to 4 creatures; single target saves at -2.
manualNotes: Hold person for monsters.
suggestedEffect: Paralyzes up to 4 creatures; single target saves at -2.

name: Magic Jar
effect: Caster’s life force inhabits a container and may possess bodies.
manualNotes: Body-swapping possession through a jar focus.
suggestedEffect: Caster’s life force inhabits a container and may possess bodies.

name: Pass-Wall
effect: Creates passage through solid rock or wall.
manualNotes: Opens temporary tunnel through barrier.
suggestedEffect: Creates passage through solid rock or wall.

name: Telekinesis
effect: Moves objects by mental force up to caster weight limit.
manualNotes: Moves objects at range by concentration.
suggestedEffect: Moves objects by mental force up to caster weight limit.

name: Teleport
effect: Teleports one creature/object to known destination, with error risk.
manualNotes: Long-distance teleport based on familiarity.
suggestedEffect: Teleports one creature/object to known destination, with error risk.

name: Anti-Magic Shell
effect: Creates barrier around caster blocking magic in or out.
manualNotes: Caster is insulated from magic but cannot cast through shell.
suggestedEffect: Creates barrier around caster blocking magic in or out.

name: Death Spell
effect: Kills 4d8 HD of living creatures in 60 ft cube.
manualNotes: Slays groups of weaker living creatures.
suggestedEffect: Kills 4d8 HD of living creatures in 60 ft cube.

name: Disintegrate
effect: Disintegrates one creature or nonmagical object.
manualNotes: Destroys target if save fails.
suggestedEffect: Disintegrates one creature or nonmagical object.

name: Geas
effect: Compels a creature to perform a task or suffer penalties.
manualNotes: Magical command binding target to a task.
suggestedEffect: Compels a creature to perform a task or suffer penalties.

name: Invisible Stalker
effect: Summons invisible stalker to perform a task.
manualNotes: Invisible servant hunts or retrieves as commanded.
suggestedEffect: Summons invisible stalker to perform a task.

name: Lower Water
effect: Lowers water level in a large area.
manualNotes: Creates passage through or reduces water.
suggestedEffect: Lowers water level in a large area.

name: Move Earth
effect: Moves soil terrain slowly, reshaping earth.
manualNotes: Large-scale earthmoving, not stone.
suggestedEffect: Moves soil terrain slowly, reshaping earth.

name: Part Water
effect: Parts water to create dry path.
manualNotes: Opens a passage through water.
suggestedEffect: Parts water to create dry path.

name: Projected Image
effect: Creates image through which caster can cast spells.
manualNotes: Remote image acts as spellcasting origin.
suggestedEffect: Creates image through which caster can cast spells.

name: Reincarnation
effect: Returns dead character as a new body/creature.
manualNotes: Restores life in a new form.
suggestedEffect: Returns dead character as a new body/creature.

name: Stone to Flesh
effect: Restores petrified creature; reverse turns flesh to stone.
manualNotes: Reverses petrification; reverse petrifies a target.
suggestedEffect: Restores petrified creature; reverse turns flesh to stone.

name: Delayed Blast Fire Ball
effect: Creates a delayed fire ball that explodes after a chosen delay, dealing up to 20d6 fire damage.
manualNotes: Fire ball with chosen detonation delay.
suggestedEffect: Creates a delayed fire ball that explodes after a chosen delay, dealing up to 20d6 fire damage.

name: Magic Door
effect: Creates an invisible magical passage through up to 10 ft of nonliving material; reverse creates magic lock.
manualNotes: Creates secret passage; reverse locks portal.
suggestedEffect: Creates an invisible magical passage through up to 10 ft of nonliving material; reverse creates magic lock.

name: Mass Invisibility
effect: Makes many creatures or objects invisible within a 60 ft square area; reverse reveals invisibility.
manualNotes: Grants invisibility to many targets.
suggestedEffect: Makes many creatures or objects invisible within a 60 ft square area; reverse reveals invisibility.

name: Power Word Stun
effect: Stuns one creature with 70 hp or fewer; lower hp targets are stunned longer.
manualNotes: Stuns a low-hit-point target without save.
suggestedEffect: Stuns one creature with 70 hp or fewer; lower hp targets are stunned longer.

name: Reverse Gravity
effect: Causes creatures and objects in a 30 ft cube to fall upward, then fall back when gravity returns.
manualNotes: Briefly reverses gravity in an area.
suggestedEffect: Causes creatures and objects in a 30 ft cube to fall upward, then fall back when gravity returns.

name: Mass Charm
effect: Charms multiple creatures with total levels or Hit Dice based on caster level; reverse removes charm.
manualNotes: Charms many creatures at once.
suggestedEffect: Charms multiple creatures with total levels or Hit Dice based on caster level; reverse removes charm.

name: Symbol
effect: Creates a magical rune with one chosen effect triggered by reading, touching, or passing.
manualNotes: Creates triggered magical symbol.
suggestedEffect: Creates a magical rune with one chosen effect triggered by reading, touching, or passing.

name: Meteor Swarm
effect: Creates four or eight fiery meteors that explode for heavy fire damage in selected areas.
manualNotes: Creates multiple explosive meteors.
suggestedEffect: Creates four or eight fiery meteors that explode for heavy fire damage in selected areas.

name: Power Word Kill
effect: Kills one or more creatures within hit point limits; no saving throw.
manualNotes: Kills low-hit-point targets without save.
suggestedEffect: Kills one or more creatures within hit point limits; no saving throw.

name: Cureall
effect: Cures one major affliction or nearly all damage, leaving only 1-6 damage remaining.
manualNotes: Cures one condition or nearly all wounds.
suggestedEffect: Cures one major affliction or nearly all damage, leaving only 1-6 damage remaining.

name: Plant Door
effect: Allows the druid to pass through trees and dense plant growth as if through a doorway.
manualNotes: Moves through plant matter.
suggestedEffect: Allows the druid to pass through trees and dense plant growth as if through a doorway.

name: Pass Plant
effect: Short-range teleportation from one tree into another tree of the same type.
manualNotes: Tree-to-tree teleport.
suggestedEffect: Short-range teleportation from one tree into another tree of the same type.

name: Anti-Animal Shell
effect: Personal invisible barrier blocks attacks from normal and giant animals and animal-intelligence creatures.
manualNotes: Blocks animal attacks around caster.
suggestedEffect: Personal invisible barrier blocks attacks from normal and giant animals and animal-intelligence creatures.

name: Transport Through Plants
effect: Long-range plant teleport; druid enters one living plant and exits another on the same plane.
manualNotes: Long-range travel through living plants.
suggestedEffect: Long-range plant teleport; druid enters one living plant and exits another on the same plane.

name: Summon Weather
effect: Summons weather appropriate to the climate and season over a broad area.
manualNotes: Calls appropriate natural weather.
suggestedEffect: Summons weather appropriate to the climate and season over a broad area.

name: Creeping Doom
effect: Summons a swarm of insects that moves as directed and deals damage to creatures it engulfs.
manualNotes: Summons deadly insect swarm.
suggestedEffect: Summons a swarm of insects that moves as directed and deals damage to creatures it engulfs.

name: Metal to Wood
effect: Transforms metal items in the area into wood, affecting weapons, armor, and gear.
manualNotes: Turns metal objects into wood.
suggestedEffect: Transforms metal items in the area into wood, affecting weapons, armor, and gear.

name: Weather Control
effect: Allows the druid to choose and control local outdoor weather while concentrating.
manualNotes: Controls outdoor weather.
suggestedEffect: Allows the druid to choose and control local outdoor weather while concentrating.

name: Contact Outer Plane
effect: Contact an Outer Plane Immortal to ask 3-12 questions, risking insanity for better knowledge.
manualNotes: Ask questions of an Immortal with risk of insanity.
suggestedEffect: Contact an Outer Plane Immortal to ask 3-12 questions, risking insanity for better knowledge.

name: Dissolve
effect: Turns up to 3,000 square ft of rock or soil into mud; reverse hardens mud to rock permanently.
manualNotes: Liquefies ground into mud; reverse hardens mud.
suggestedEffect: Turns up to 3,000 square ft of rock or soil into mud; reverse hardens mud to rock permanently.

name: Wall of Stone
effect: Creates a stone wall or shape that can be used as a barrier or structure.
manualNotes: Creates permanent stone wall.
suggestedEffect: Creates a stone wall or shape that can be used as a barrier or structure.

name: Wall of Iron
effect: Creates a vertical iron wall that can block passage or topple to damage targets.
manualNotes: Creates permanent iron wall.
suggestedEffect: Creates a vertical iron wall that can block passage or topple to damage targets.

name: Weather Control
effect: Changes outdoor weather in a broad area while the caster concentrates.
manualNotes: Controls outdoor weather.
suggestedEffect: Changes outdoor weather in a broad area while the caster concentrates.

name: Charm Plant
effect: Charms plant creatures or controls ordinary plant growth in an area.
manualNotes: Controls plants or charms plant monsters.
suggestedEffect: Charms plant creatures or controls ordinary plant growth in an area.

name: Create Normal Monsters
effect: Creates normal monsters up to total Hit Dice equal to caster level; they obey commands then vanish.
manualNotes: Creates temporary normal monsters.
suggestedEffect: Creates normal monsters up to total Hit Dice equal to caster level; they obey commands then vanish.

name: Lore
effect: Reveals detailed knowledge about one item, place, or person, with time required varying by familiarity.
manualNotes: Researches lore of an item, place, or person.
suggestedEffect: Reveals detailed knowledge about one item, place, or person, with time required varying by familiarity.

name: Statue
effect: Caster may become a stone statue and return to normal once per round during the spell.
manualNotes: Caster can shift into statue form.
suggestedEffect: Caster may become a stone statue and return to normal once per round during the spell.

name: Summon Object
effect: Summons one nonliving object from the caster's home to hand, if prepared and not blocked.
manualNotes: Calls a prepared object to the caster.
suggestedEffect: Summons one nonliving object from the caster's home to hand, if prepared and not blocked.

name: Sword
effect: Creates a magical sword of force that attacks as directed by the caster.
manualNotes: Creates floating magical attacking sword.
suggestedEffect: Creates a magical sword of force that attacks as directed by the caster.

name: Teleport any Object
effect: Teleports one object to a known destination; mishap chances apply by familiarity.
manualNotes: Teleports an object.
suggestedEffect: Teleports one object to a known destination; mishap chances apply by familiarity.

name: Dance
effect: Forces one touched victim to dance helplessly, losing AC and saves while unable to act.
manualNotes: Makes touched victim dance helplessly.
suggestedEffect: Forces one touched victim to dance helplessly, losing AC and saves while unable to act.

name: Explosive Cloud
effect: Creates a moving poisonous cloud that can also explode if touched by fire.
manualNotes: Creates deadly cloud that may explode.
suggestedEffect: Creates a moving poisonous cloud that can also explode if touched by fire.

name: Mind Barrier
effect: Protects caster from ESP, crystal balls, and similar mind-reading or scrying; reverse opens mind to reading.
manualNotes: Blocks mental detection and scrying.
suggestedEffect: Protects caster from ESP, crystal balls, and similar mind-reading or scrying; reverse opens mind to reading.

name: Permanence
effect: Makes certain spell effects permanent, subject to restrictions and dispel magic.
manualNotes: Makes eligible magic effects permanent.
suggestedEffect: Makes certain spell effects permanent, subject to restrictions and dispel magic.

name: Polymorph any Object
effect: Changes one object or creature into another form; duration depends on similarity.
manualNotes: Transforms almost any object or creature.
suggestedEffect: Changes one object or creature into another form; duration depends on similarity.

name: Power Word Blind
effect: Blinds one or more creatures with hit point limits; no saving throw.
manualNotes: Blinds targets by current hit points.
suggestedEffect: Blinds one or more creatures with hit point limits; no saving throw.

name: Gate
effect: Opens a gate to another plane or calls a powerful creature; reverse closes a gate.
manualNotes: Opens planar gate or calls entity.
suggestedEffect: Opens a gate to another plane or calls a powerful creature; reverse closes a gate.

name: Maze
effect: Banishes one creature into an extradimensional maze until it escapes after a time based on Intelligence.
manualNotes: Traps target in extradimensional maze.
suggestedEffect: Banishes one creature into an extradimensional maze until it escapes after a time based on Intelligence.
